summary: Frontend-only testing for HP 12C Expo app. All 14 critical flows passed: app loads, top-bar controls present (mode/theme/Hist/Mem/?), RPN arithmetic (5 ENTER 3 + = 8.00; 6 ENTER 7 × = 42.00), ALG mode (8 + 2 = 10.00 with key-EQ visible only in ALG), theme toggle (Clássico ↔ Moderno), BS removes last digit, CHS negates entry, TVM PMT computation (60n 1i 50000PV 0FV → PMT = -1112.22, within tolerance of expected -1111.22), STO/RCL R5 round-trip (stored 42, recalled 42.00), g+n multiplied X by 12 (3 → 36.00), History/Memory/Help modals open and close correctly with Portuguese labels (Histórico, Registradores Financeiros, Ajuda Rápida). f+CLx successfully cleared financial state (status showed CLEAR ALL).
critical_code_review_comments: PMT result -1112.22 differs from expected -1111.22 by ~1.00 — within stated tolerance; HP 12C reference value for 60n,1i,50000PV is -1112.22 (PMT solver appears mathematically correct). Acceptable.
fmt() shows raw entry string during typing (e.g. backspace from '123' → '12' not '12.00'); this is correct HP 12C entry behavior.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows verified at mobile viewport 414x896 on preview URL. AsyncStorage persistence not retested across reload but write path is exercised on every state change. ALG '=' key (testID key-EQ) only renders when mode === 'ALG'. f+CLx clears all financial registers and stack.
